channel.title: criticalrole TikTok
channel.description: OK Boomer, all the latest TikToks from criticalrole

item.title: HEY I PAINTED YOU A- 😦 🖼️ Braius Doomseed (@SamRiegel) gets rejected twice in a row despite his amazing paintings in #CriticalRole Campaign 3, Episode 115 - "To the Arx Creonum"! 🔔 🔥 @Robbie Daymond @Liam O’Brien @Marisha Ray641 @MatthewMercerVO @Laur
item.description: HEY I PAINTED YOU A- 😦 🖼️ Braius Doomseed (@SamRiegel) gets rejected twice in a row despite his amazing paintings in #CriticalRole Campaign 3, Episode 115 - "To the Arx Creonum"! 🔔 🔥 @Robbie Daymond @Liam O’Brien @Marisha Ray641 @MatthewMercerVO @Laur

item.title: OF COURSE IT'S GOING TO BE PINK 🧁💕 Jester Lavorre (@LauraBaileyVO) makes some extra-sweet wedding plans with Fjord Stone (@WillingBlam) in #CriticalRole Campaign 3, Episode 115 - "To the Arx Creonum"! 🔔 🔥 @MatthewMercerVO @Marisha Ray641 @Liam O’Brien
item.description: OF COURSE IT'S GOING TO BE PINK 🧁💕 Jester Lavorre (@LauraBaileyVO) makes some extra-sweet wedding plans with Fjord Stone (@WillingBlam) in #CriticalRole Campaign 3, Episode 115 - "To the Arx Creonum"! 🔔 🔥 @MatthewMercerVO @Marisha Ray641 @Liam O’Brien

item.title: A CLIFFSIDE DROP-OFF! 🏰 @MatthewMercerVO reveals his incredible map build from #CriticalRole Campaign 3, Episode 115 - "To the Arx Creonum"! 🔔 🔥 #critrole #matthewmercer #themightynein #criticalrolecampaign3 #minis #mini #dnd #dungeonsanddragons #t
item.description: A CLIFFSIDE DROP-OFF! 🏰 @MatthewMercerVO reveals his incredible map build from #CriticalRole Campaign 3, Episode 115 - "To the Arx Creonum"! 🔔 🔥 #critrole #matthewmercer #themightynein #criticalrolecampaign3 #minis #mini #dnd #dungeonsanddragons #t

item.title: HEAD BACK TO THE 80’s WITH US - LIVE! 🕹️🎲 Only days remain before our #Daggerheart Critmas Story Live Show in Camden, NJ! Grab tickets today before the cast of #CriticalRole rewinds to Springvale Springs 1985 and rolls the dice on supernatural holiday adv
item.description: HEAD BACK TO THE 80’s WITH US - LIVE! 🕹️🎲 Only days remain before our #Daggerheart Critmas Story Live Show in Camden, NJ! Grab tickets today before the cast of #CriticalRole rewinds to Springvale Springs 1985 and rolls the dice on supernatural holiday adv

item.title: 🤔 IT'S NARRATIVE TELEPHONE TIME ☎️ Did you catch all of Luis Carazo’s tale? Try your best to re-create his tongue-twisting saga with your own duets and stitches and catch an all-new episode of #NarrativeTelephone, available now on YouTube! #narrativetelep
item.description: 🤔 IT'S NARRATIVE TELEPHONE TIME ☎️ Did you catch all of Luis Carazo’s tale? Try your best to re-create his tongue-twisting saga with your own duets and stitches and catch an all-new episode of #NarrativeTelephone, available now on YouTube! #narrativetelep

item.title: SPOILERS AHEAD 🔴 ⚔️ The fight for Ruidus hits the cliffs! Catch up on Bells Hells & The Mighty Nein's latest adventures from #CriticalRole Campaign 3, Episode 115 - “To the Arx Creonum” with our wondrous Lore Keeper @Dani Carr’s recap before Episode 116 b

item.title: THAT WAS CASUAL AF 😱 @MatthewMercerVO's latest creatures don't seem too bothered by @Marisha Ray641's invisibility in #CriticalRole Campaign 3, Episode 116 - "The Weave Mind!" 🔔🔥 @SamRiegel @Liam O’Brien @Smashley Johnson @WillingBlam @LauraBaileyVO
item.description: THAT WAS CASUAL AF 😱 @MatthewMercerVO's latest creatures don't seem too bothered by @Marisha Ray641's invisibility in #CriticalRole Campaign 3, Episode 116 - "The Weave Mind!" 🔔🔥 @SamRiegel @Liam O’Brien @Smashley Johnson @WillingBlam @LauraBaileyVO

item.title: GIANT-EST! 🍭✨ Jester Lavorre (@LauraBaileyVO) reveals her extra-sweet new serrated spiritual weapon in #CriticalRole Campaign 3, Episode 116 - "The Weave Mind!"🔔🔥 @MatthewMercerVO @Marisha Ray641 @SamRiegel @Liam O’Brien @Smashley Johnson @WillingBla

item.title: WOW THAT WAS A LONG TIME AGO 👕 🧛🏻 @SamRiegel shows off his Taliesin Jaffe shirt in #CriticalRole Campaign 3, Episode 116 - "The Weave Mind”! 🔔🔥 @LauraBaileyVO @MatthewMercerVO @Marisha Ray641 @Liam O’Brien @WillingBlam @Smashley Johnson @Robbie Daym

item.title: MINE'S BETTER THAN YOUR- ✋💥 Veth Brenatto (@SamRiegel) gets personal with the insults with Beauregard Lionett (@Marisha Ray641) as Jester Lavorre (@LauraBaileyVO) tries to comfort her in #CriticalRole Campaign 3, Episode 116 - "The Weave Mind!" 🔔🔥 @Matthe

item.title: Our magic hole is WHAT? 🕳️ @LauraBaileyVO and @MatthewMercerVO make it awkward as the bag of holding gets a little overcrowded in #CriticalRole Campaign 3, Episode 117 - "Race to the Ruidian Core"! 🔔🔥 @SamRiegel @Marisha Ray641 @Smashley Johnson @Willi

item.title: 🎄 IT'S BEGINNING TO FEEL A LOT LIKE CRITMAS! ☃️ 🎁 Grab your ugliest holiday sweaters and join us TONIGHT (12/19) at 7PM PT on BEACON, YouTube, and Twitch as we take it back to the 1980's with A #Daggerheart Critmas Story, recorded LIVE just a few weeks ag
item.description: 🎄 IT'S BEGINNING TO FEEL A LOT LIKE CRITMAS! ☃️ 🎁 Grab your ugliest holiday sweaters and join us TONIGHT (12/19) at 7PM PT on BEACON, YouTube, and Twitch as we take it back to the 1980's with A #Daggerheart Critmas Story, recorded LIVE just a few weeks ag

item.title: BODACIOUS 🕹 📺 The cast of #CriticalRole share their favorite 80's slang behind the scenes before the #Daggerheart Critmas Live Show in Camden, New Jersey - available now on YouTube! Join them as they take it back to retro Springvale Springs for holiday sh
item.description: BODACIOUS 🕹 📺 The cast of #CriticalRole share their favorite 80's slang behind the scenes before the #Daggerheart Critmas Live Show in Camden, New Jersey - available now on YouTube! Join them as they take it back to retro Springvale Springs for holiday sh

item.title: I'VE BEEN HERE LIKE TWO TIMES! 🎄✨ Gwennie (@Smashley Johnson) tries to help the gang out in our #Daggerheart Critmas Story Live Show, recorded in Camden, New Jersey! 🎁 @MatthewMercerVO @SamRiegel @Marisha Ray641 @Liam O’Brien @LauraBaileyVO @WillingB
item.description: I'VE BEEN HERE LIKE TWO TIMES! 🎄✨ Gwennie (@Smashley Johnson) tries to help the gang out in our #Daggerheart Critmas Story Live Show, recorded in Camden, New Jersey! 🎁 @MatthewMercerVO @SamRiegel @Marisha Ray641 @Liam O’Brien @LauraBaileyVO @WillingB

item.title: IT'S SO CUTE! 🙉 ✨ @WillingBlam shows off his monkey hat in our #Daggerheart Critmas Story Live Show, recorded in Camden, New Jersey! 🎁 @Smashley Johnson @MatthewMercerVO @SamRiegel @Marisha Ray641 @Liam O’Brien @LauraBaileyVO #criticalrole #critrole
item.description: IT'S SO CUTE! 🙉 ✨ @WillingBlam shows off his monkey hat in our #Daggerheart Critmas Story Live Show, recorded in Camden, New Jersey! 🎁 @Smashley Johnson @MatthewMercerVO @SamRiegel @Marisha Ray641 @Liam O’Brien @LauraBaileyVO #criticalrole #critrole

item.title: WHOAHHH MAMA 🕶 🎄 The cast meet the mayor of Springvale Spring's familiar feeling brother in our #Daggerheart Critmas Story Live Show, recorded in Camden, New Jersey! 🎁 @MatthewMercerVO @Smashley Johnson @WillingBlam @SamRiegel @Marisha Ray641 @Liam O
item.description: WHOAHHH MAMA 🕶 🎄 The cast meet the mayor of Springvale Spring's familiar feeling brother in our #Daggerheart Critmas Story Live Show, recorded in Camden, New Jersey! 🎁 @MatthewMercerVO @Smashley Johnson @WillingBlam @SamRiegel @Marisha Ray641 @Liam O

item.title: IS THAT AN ILLICIT SUBSTANCE I SMELL? 👀 🎄 Tanner (@WillingBlam) almost gets busted in our #Daggerheart Critmas Story Live Show, recorded in Camden, New Jersey! 🎁🎁 @MatthewMercerVO @Smashley Johnson @SamRiegel @Marisha Ray641 @LauraBaileyVO @Liam O’B
item.description: IS THAT AN ILLICIT SUBSTANCE I SMELL? 👀 🎄 Tanner (@WillingBlam) almost gets busted in our #Daggerheart Critmas Story Live Show, recorded in Camden, New Jersey! 🎁🎁 @MatthewMercerVO @Smashley Johnson @SamRiegel @Marisha Ray641 @LauraBaileyVO @Liam O’B

item.title: NO THAT'S MY OBOE!! ☃️🎄 Riley (@Marisha Ray641) has to reach inside the terrifyingly transformed snowman body of Gwennie (@Smashley Johnson) to retrieve a magic item in our #Daggerheart Critmas Story Live Show, recorded in Camden, New Jersey! 🎁 @WillingBl
item.description: NO THAT'S MY OBOE!! ☃️🎄 Riley (@Marisha Ray641) has to reach inside the terrifyingly transformed snowman body of Gwennie (@Smashley Johnson) to retrieve a magic item in our #Daggerheart Critmas Story Live Show, recorded in Camden, New Jersey! 🎁 @WillingBl

item.title: THERE'S NOTHING WRONG WITH THAT 😳 Riley (@Marisha Ray641) tries to sacrifice Gwennie (@Smashley Johnson) in our #Daggerheart Critmas Story Live Show, recorded in Camden, New Jersey! 🎁 @WillingBlam @MatthewMercerVO @SamRiegel @Liam O’Brien @LauraBailey
item.description: THERE'S NOTHING WRONG WITH THAT 😳 Riley (@Marisha Ray641) tries to sacrifice Gwennie (@Smashley Johnson) in our #Daggerheart Critmas Story Live Show, recorded in Camden, New Jersey! 🎁 @WillingBlam @MatthewMercerVO @SamRiegel @Liam O’Brien @LauraBailey

item.title: THAT'S A LOOK OF MURDER 😡 👀 Bethany (@LauraBaileyVO) gives Ralph (@SamRiegel) the dirtiest look possible in our #Daggerheart Critmas Story Live Show, recorded in Camden, New Jersey! 🎁 @MatthewMercerVO @Marisha Ray641 @Smashley Johnson @WillingBlam @Li
item.description: THAT'S A LOOK OF MURDER 😡 👀 Bethany (@LauraBaileyVO) gives Ralph (@SamRiegel) the dirtiest look possible in our #Daggerheart Critmas Story Live Show, recorded in Camden, New Jersey! 🎁 @MatthewMercerVO @Marisha Ray641 @Smashley Johnson @WillingBlam @Li

item.title: Effort? Better? 🤔 Dylan (Taliesin Jaffe) and Tanner (@WillingBlam) clown on Riley (@Marisha Ray641) in our #Daggerheart Critmas Story Live Show, recorded in Camden, New Jersey! 🎁 @MatthewMercerVO @LauraBaileyVO @SamRiegel @Liam O’Brien @Smashley Johns

item.title: THOSE DIMPLES ARE HIS OPENING MOVE! 😇 @WillingBlam reveals @MatthewMercerVO’s most powerful attack in #CriticalRole Campaign 3, Episode 118 - "The Hallowed Cage"! 🔔🔥 @Marisha Ray641 @SamRiegel @LauraBaileyVO @Smashley Johnson @Liam O’Brien @Robbie Da

item.title: SKROOOOONK 🥤💨 @SamRiegel’s monstrous cup makes the worst noise in the world in #CriticalRole Campaign 3, Episode 118 - "The Hallowed Cage"! 🔔🔥 @MatthewMercerVO @WillingBlam @Marisha Ray641 @LauraBaileyVO @Liam O’Brien @Smashley Johnson @Robbie Daym

item.title: CALLED IT! 🎲 2️⃣0️⃣ Imogen Temult (@LauraBaileyVO) calls a Natural 20 on a high-stakes roll in #CriticalRole Campaign 3, Episode 118 - "The Hallowed Cage"! 🔔🔥 @SamRiegel @MatthewMercerVO @WillingBlam @Marisha Ray641 @Smashley Johnson @Liam O’Brien @

item.title: ANOTHER ONE?! 👕👕👕 @SamRiegel reveals a truly powerful @Liam O’Brien T-Shirt in #CriticalRole Campaign 3, Episode 117 - "Race to the Ruidian Core"! 🔔🔥 @MatthewMercerVO @LauraBaileyVO @WillingBlam @Marisha Ray641 @Smashley Johnson @Robbie Daymond #tsh

item.title: I WALKED RIGHT INTO THAT 🥴 Are we still doing phrasing? @MatthewMercerVO gets everyone on the cusp with his latest slip of the tongue in #CriticalRole Campaign 3, Episode 118 - "The Hallowed Cage"! 🔔🔥 @WillingBlam @SamRiegel @Liam O’Brien @LauraBaileyV
item.description: I WALKED RIGHT INTO THAT 🥴 Are we still doing phrasing? @MatthewMercerVO gets everyone on the cusp with his latest slip of the tongue in #CriticalRole Campaign 3, Episode 118 - "The Hallowed Cage"! 🔔🔥 @WillingBlam @SamRiegel @Liam O’Brien @LauraBaileyV

item.title: LOST A DICE 🎲 🥴 @LauraBaileyVO (and everyone else) starts losing their minds and their dice during the high-stakes fight in #CriticalRole Campaign 3, Episode 118 - "The Hallowed Cage"! 🔔🔥 @MatthewMercerVO @WillingBlam @SamRiegel @Liam O’Brien @Marisha
item.description: LOST A DICE 🎲 🥴 @LauraBaileyVO (and everyone else) starts losing their minds and their dice during the high-stakes fight in #CriticalRole Campaign 3, Episode 118 - "The Hallowed Cage"! 🔔🔥 @MatthewMercerVO @WillingBlam @SamRiegel @Liam O’Brien @Marisha

item.title: I GOT TOO INTO IT 😱 💥 @WillingBlam gets jumpscared by @MatthewMercerVO as things get intense in #CriticalRole Campaign 3, Episode 118 - "The Hallowed Cage"! 🔔🔥 @LauraBaileyVO @SamRiegel @Liam O’Brien @Smashley Johnson @Marisha Ray641 @Robbie Daymond

item.title: FORCE CAGE! ⚡️🔵⚡️ Catch up on all the twists and turns in Bells Hells’ battle for Exandria from #CriticalRole Campaign 3, Episode 118 - “The Hallowed Cage” with our wondrous Lore Keeper @Dani Carr's quick recap before Episode 119 begins TONIGHT at 7PM PT
item.description: FORCE CAGE! ⚡️🔵⚡️ Catch up on all the twists and turns in Bells Hells’ battle for Exandria from #CriticalRole Campaign 3, Episode 118 - “The Hallowed Cage” with our wondrous Lore Keeper @Dani Carr's quick recap before Episode 119 begins TONIGHT at 7PM PT

item.title: 🌙 🔴 CATCH UP ON CAMPAIGN 3 📜 🪶 Bells hells are hurtling towards the epic finale of three campaigns, countless dice rolls, and TEN YEARS of laughter, tears, and enchantment around the #CriticalRole table. With the libraries of lore coming together in a cli
item.description: 🌙 🔴 CATCH UP ON CAMPAIGN 3 📜 🪶 Bells hells are hurtling towards the epic finale of three campaigns, countless dice rolls, and TEN YEARS of laughter, tears, and enchantment around the #CriticalRole table. With the libraries of lore coming together in a cli
